college_info.college_name: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for courses at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: The fees structure for programs offerred by the Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences is INR 180000 - INR 220000.

faqs.question: Is the faculty at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences, well-qualified and experienced?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences have rating of 3 for the faculty by students. It represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: Does Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences has received an impressive review rating of 3 on Placements based on 1 feedback of verified Shiksha students.

faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences is a well-known institution for M.Pharma, B.Pharma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences has course specializations in Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: In the previous year, almost 50% of students got placed in our college. Dr. Reddy's Laboratories offered internships to acquire knowledge of the industry. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA. Other pharmaceutical companies also offered jobs. Top recruiting software companies were TCS, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our library has a lot of books beyond the pharmacy field. Classrooms have a good atmosphere where students like to learn. Our labs have sophisticated equipment. Our college provides hostels for both boys and girls with good food. A gym facility is available in the hostel.

paragraphs: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission.  The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG and PG level in the field of Medicine and Health Sciences. Read below for more details on Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admission process:

courses_data.name: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences B.Pharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences B.Pharmais offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.Pharma programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 4 years programme.

courses_data.description: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences M.Pharmais offered to candidates at the PG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the M.Pharma programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 2 years programme.

faqs.answer: A:    Ranaghat College has been rated 3.38 on Placements on the basis of 38 reviews given by the students.
faqs.question: Is Ranaghat College, known for its strong placement facility?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ranaghat College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences and Science. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. Ranaghat College courses are offered to students in Full Time mode.

faqs.answer: A:    Ranaghat College offers various courses like B.A, B.Sc, B.Com in Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Teaching & Education, Accounting & Commerce stream. Ranaghat College has specializations such as English, Zoology, Botany, Chemistry, Mathematics, Physics.
faqs.question: Which specializations can I find in the programs offered at Ranaghat College?

reviews_list.review_title: The college is good for placements.

review_content.Placements: Ranaghat College offers impressive placement support, especially in the Science and Commerce streams. Many students get placed in reputed companies through campus drives. The placement cell is active and helpful, guiding students throughout the process.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

review_summary.college_name: Ranaghat College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

content.Placements: My course is called Philosophy Honours, which is a very good subject. Many students get admitted to this course after completing honors. If you do an M.A., you have the opportunity to go into teaching; the salary in the teaching line starts from 30,000 to 50,000.
content.Infrastructure: My college has Wi-Fi connection in the classrooms and library, which gives us many benefits. Our college has a canteen where good food is available. Our college has a medical facility. If something happens to someone, they are given medicine from there. Our college has a big field where we sometimes play sports.

individual_reviews.title: The college is good for placements.

content.Placements: Ranaghat College offers impressive placement support, especially in the Science and Commerce streams. Many students get placed in reputed companies through campus drives. The placement cell is active and helpful, guiding students throughout the process.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

individual_reviews.title: The college is good for placements.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is good in every aspect. I am happy to study at this college.

content.Placements: 20-30% of students have been placed in our course. The highest salary is 10 LPA - 15 LPA. The lowest salary is 2 LPA to 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are TCS, Reliance, Wipro, etc. The company reached our college in the placement campus, and many students joined it. 20-30% of students got internships at TCS, Wipro, Reliance, etc. Roles offered are manager and season head.
content.Infrastructure: All the things are available in our college that are on your list. Our college has no hostal, so this is a bad thing. Our college should improve this thing so I request our faculty to create a new hostel for long distance students who study well, that's all I want in my school.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: My college has Wi-Fi connection in the classrooms and library, which gives us many benefits. Our college has a canteen where good food is available. Our college has a medical facility. If something happens to someone, they are given medicine from there. Our college has a big field where we sometimes play sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good in every aspect. I am happy to study at this college.
reviews.review_text: All the things are available in our college that are on your list. Our college has no hostal, so this is a bad thing. Our college should improve this thing so I request our faculty to create a new hostel for long distance students who study well, that's all I want in my school.

reviews.review_heading: Why I prefer Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained. The environment is supportive of focused academic learning. A new building is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are great. The college campus is better than any other college. Proper air-conditioning systems and smart monitoring are also available. Wi-Fi is always available. Labs and classes are conducted daily. There is no hostel for the students they stay near PGs.

reviews.review_heading: A college where you can grow.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 big classrooms for our department. Our professors have their rooms. We have a Wi-Fi facility but it is out of data and the library is lacking books for our course. College canteen provides good food most of the time. College union is helpful too.

reviews.review_heading: Reasons for joining Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members and infrastructure are available for this course. Labs, classrooms, and the library are available, and Wi-Fi is available. A canteen, medical facilities, and sports and games are available. The quality of canteen food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, my college is one of the colleges one can enter.
reviews.review_text: Lab is accessible to students with special educational needs and disabilities . It is large enough to accommodate classes . Also, the quality of food in the canteen or hostel is more than average. And there is also a large sports ground and enough equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Ofcourse it's a good course.
reviews.review_text: It's a government college and that's so obvious we will not have so many facilities. But yes, it was clean and tidy classrooms but not the washrooms it was very untidy and so was the canteen. There were no medical facilities out there. Everything we got was basic.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: This college provides hostels for Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 20,000 per year. The college provides Wi-Fi routers in hostels, but those are not good. We brought a Jio Wi-Fi router with the help of some seniors. Labs are decent, and the library is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students to make their future bright.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are average and seating quality is not good. Hostel room quality is good. Wi-Fi is provided at average speed. Labs are average. The library's condition is good. There is a good ground to play. The infrastructure of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like fans, laboratory, classrooms, big hall room, library, drinking water, washrooms, and sitting area are available. Sports like football, chess, cricket, badminton, etc., are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements from well reputed and renowned companies.
reviews.review_text: High-quality infrastructure and facilities are provided in our college. It improves student outcomes and reduces dropout rates.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Ranaghat College

likes.text: Placement is very good and most of the students get placed in reputed organisation and companies with very good college is very funny handsome salary.

faqs.answer: Rao Mohar Singh College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityD.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination or equivalent with pass in Chemistry, Physics and Biology/Mathematics from a recognised board Or Candidate who has passed Intermediate examination in Science Or Candidate who are in First year of the three years degree courses in Science Or Candidate who has passed 12 years Higher Secondary Education Board Exam (Science academic stream with Physics, Chemistry, Biology) of Higher Secondary Education Board, Nepal Or Pre-degree examination or Any other qualification approved by Pharmacy Council of India as equivalent to any of the above examination can also apply for the course.

college_info.college_name: Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management

placements.overview: Established in 2004, Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management is a premier institute located in Solan, Himachal Pradesh. The institute offers Degree courses including PG and UG programs. These programs are offered in full-time mode. Candidate can pursue multiple ranges of courses like B.Pharma, B.Sc., BBA, M.Pharma, M.Sc. in the stream of Business and Management Studies, Medicine and Health Sciences, Science. Over the period, Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management has gained expertise through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of Biotechnology, Microbiology, Botany, Chemistry, Pharmacology, Pharmacognosy, Pharmaceutical, Biotechnology, Microbiology. These courses offered by the institute are recognised by approving bodies like PCI. Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management offers courses distributed over 462 seats in total. Courses offered by the institute are in the fee range of INR 129,000-182,000. The institute provides good facilities all around the campus.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management is approximately INR 129000 - INR 182000.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management?

faqs.answer: A:    Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management is a well-known institution for M.Sc, M.Pharma, B.Pharma, BBA, B.Sc. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management has course specializations in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Botany, Chemistry, Pharmacology, Pharmacognosy, Pharmaceutical.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management?

faqs.answer: A:    Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management provides programmes including M.Sc, M.Pharma, B.Pharma, BBA, B.Sc. in streams such as Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Botany, Chemistry, Pharmacology, Pharmacognosy, Pharmaceutical.
faqs.question: Which courses does Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: SILB is an amazing institute for BBA.

review_content.Placements: Most students who desired to get placed got a placement. The highest package in the year 2020 was 5 LPA, and the lowest was 2.5 LPA. Most of the students got an internship in our course. Top roles offered were Axis Bank, ICICI, and many other companies came as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available were good. The infrastructure was also good, with good Wi-Fi, good labs, and good classrooms. Library was also good. SILB did not offer hostel as such. The quality of food available in canteen was good. Medical facilities offered were also nice.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good online classes and very helpful teachers of college.

review_content.Placements: 93 percent of students were placed in my college. The average package offered in my college ranges from 2 LPA to 12 LPA. Roles include data analyst, software developer, and other IT roles, web developer, data entry specialist, and programmer. Top recruitment companies like Microsoft, Infosys, and Wipro recruit from here.
review_content.Infrastructure: I'm an online student; that's why I don't know about my college's infrastructure and labs. But online college facilities are very good for online students. All event and online assignment information is given to students very promptly, and all teachers are available on WhatsApp for student doubts and queries.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good in this university.

review_content.Placements: Almost everyone got placed in good companies like Aditya Birla and IDFC First Bank, etc. Everyone has done their internship, as it is mandatory to be done by every student. To be a part of an internship, the top role offered for our course was Sales Executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities that were provided by the university are access to free Wi-Fi and library access 24/7. The hostels were neat and clean. We had access to indoor games that were available on the hostel premises, like table tennis, billiards, carrom, chess, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Life Sciences - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and facilities are good. Teachers are satisfied, placements are good in all years.

review_content.Placements: Basically there all almost no placements in courses such as B.Sc. Zoology which I? M doing but for M.Sc. they can sit in placements. Roles offer in my course related to environment like environment consultant in biological park and areas. We can do internships in research companies. University is good in research people who want to go further in research they can go as university will help you very well in this.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good. Labs are well-maintained, and hostel is nice in terms of infrastructure. Washrooms and rooms are also good, and mess is satisfactory. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports like basketball, football, cricket, badminton, and many more are offered.

review_content.Placements: As it was a bachelor's degree, no recruitment took place for our batch. No top recruiters were present. We didn't have to pursue any kind of internship for our degree, as half of our degree was completed during the pandemic. No package was offered to anyone.
review_content.Infrastructure: Various facilities like labs, classrooms, etc. were provided, and the quality was excellent. The hostel facility was also excellent, and the food was okay, and the mess and canteen were also good, along with sports and games. We are also given access to a late-night canteen in our hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026

review_content.Placements: Hardly 2 or 3 students are placed in not-high-paying jobs, and the rest of them go for higher studies as there are no placements. College is not so big. You also think that if the percentage of students having jobs is 3/50, that's not enough, as you all know.
review_content.Infrastructure: College courses are decent, but hostels are not good, as hostel food is not worth it. Wi-Fi is also not working, canteen is not hygienic, and the classrooms are comparatively small. As you know, infrastructure also matters if the infrastructure is not good, so students attitude will also change.

The hostel facility was also excellent, and the food was okay, and the mess and canteen were also good, along with sports and games. We are also given access to a late-night canteen in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shoolini Institute of Life Sciences and Business Management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is done nicely considering the college area. It's views are great, and hostel facilities are pretty average. Sports enthusiasts could have a great time with badminton courts, table tennis facilities, and various sports events as well.

reviews.review_heading: Very good University with excellent infrastructure and teachers.
reviews.review_text: High-speed Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, the library, and around the campus as well. Classrooms are well-equipped with benches and study chairs. Every classroom has a projector and a screen. The hostel is also decent, with average food taste and quality, but it’s a bit expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Best private university in India: Shoolini University.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure of the course one of the best compared to other private universities. Lab are mostly fully equipped with the latest equipment. And hostel is one of the best hostel along with 5 facilities 
Food available in hostel mess is veg as well as non- veg (optional). Altogether if say then food is good as compared with other hostel .

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to study.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are top-notch with flexible security systems and a lot of extracurricular activities. They have improved the quality of their services. Classrooms are spacious. Wi-Fi service is very good. Library is commodious in a luscious environment with a collection of more than 10,000 books.

reviews.review_heading: It is a generous university.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides numerous facilities like a clean and huge building, sports courts, etc. There is a clean and beautiful college mess that serves varieties of vegetarian food at a reasonable rate. There is a cineplex on the campus, which runs various movies every day in the evening, and you can go there for free.

reviews.review_heading: I feel very lucky to study at the best university in Himachal Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: I didn't go to the campus yet, but I saw the videos of our college, and everything was good, like library, hostels etc. The facilities and quality of the hostel are good. I am not much aware of the food there. I heard that the activities in our university are very interesting and fun.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university in terms of education as well as infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This university has the best infrastructure, the most beautiful campus, well-equipped labs, one of the best library and Wi-Fi facilities 24x7. Hostel rooms are neat and clean with the most beautiful views. Food is of good quality. Facilities for sports and games are the best.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Our college classrooms and hostels are superb. Facilities of Wi-Fi are also available 24 hours in the library and classrooms. The quality of the facility in the hostel is good. The food is also awesome, and it is just like homemade food with lots of varieties. Other services like medical, sports and canteen are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: The university is good in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is very good. It has labs, classrooms, library and canteen. Medical facilities are very good. Sports and games facilities are very nice. The food quality is good and healthy.
